---
title: "PTM"
author: "Swanitha"
date: "2026-02-16"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = "/mnt/data/swanitha/PTM_Targeted/")
```

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(writexl)
cat("Working directory:", getwd(), "\n")
cat("PSM files present:", paste(list.files(pattern="psm.tsv"), collapse=", "), "\n")
setwd("/mnt/data/swanitha/PTM_Targeted/")


#1. Load mod summary
mods <- read.delim("global.modsummary.tsv", sep = "\t")

chrom_cols <- grep("Chrom.*PSMs$", names(mods), value = TRUE)
sol_cols   <- grep("Sol.*PSMs$",   names(mods), value = TRUE)

mods$Chrom_mean <- rowMeans(mods[, chrom_cols])
mods$Sol_mean   <- rowMeans(mods[, sol_cols])
mods$log2FC     <- log2((mods$Chrom_mean + 0.1) / (mods$Sol_mean + 0.1))
mods$Total      <- rowSums(mods[, c(chrom_cols, sol_cols)])

unknown <- mods %>% filter(grepl("^Unannotated", Modification)) %>%
           arrange(desc(Total))

known <- mods %>% filter(!grepl("^Unannotated|^None|isotop", Modification,
                                ignore.case = TRUE))

#2. TF-relevant PTMs
tf_ptms <- known %>%
  filter(grepl("Phospho|Acetyl|Methyl|Ubiq|Hex|Glyco|Oxidat|Nitros|Formyl",
               Modification, ignore.case = TRUE)) %>%
  select(Modification, Mass.Shift, Chrom_mean, Sol_mean, log2FC, Total) %>%
  arrange(desc(Total))

print(tf_ptms)

#3. Top unknown mods
print(head(unknown[, c("Modification","Mass.Shift","Chrom_mean","Sol_mean","log2FC","Total")], 15))

#4. Plot 
p <- tf_ptms %>%
  mutate(Mod = substr(Modification, 1, 35),
         Direction = ifelse(log2FC > 0, "Chromatin", "Soluble")) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(Mod, log2FC), y = log2FC, fill = Direction)) +
  geom_col() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Chromatin" = "#e74c3c", "Soluble" = "#3498db")) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(title = "PTM enrichment: Chromatin vs Soluble",
       x = NULL, y = "log2(Chrom / Sol)") +
  theme_minimal()

ggsave("tf_ptm_results/chrom_vs_sol.png", p, width = 8, height = 5)

#5. Load proteins, find TFs
prot <- read.delim("combined_protein.tsv", sep = "\t", row.names = NULL)

tf_keywords <- "TP53|MYC|SP[1-4]|STAT|E2F|GATA|FOX|SOX|CTCF|YY1|JUN|FOS|SMAD|RUNX|KLF|IRF|BRD|EP300|CREBBP|TAF|TBP|NFKB|RELA|MED[0-9]|REST|HDAC|KAT|PCAF|SETD|EZH|SUZ"

tf_prots <- prot %>%
  filter(grepl(tf_keywords, Entry.Name,  ignore.case = TRUE) |
         grepl(tf_keywords, Description, ignore.case = TRUE))

cat("TF proteins found:", nrow(tf_prots), "\n")

#6. TF Chrom vs Sol abundance
tf_counts <- tf_prots %>%
  select(Entry.Name, Description, contains("Spectral.Count"))

tf_counts$Chrom_mean <- rowMeans(tf_counts[, grep("Chrom.*Spectral", names(tf_counts))])
tf_counts$Sol_mean   <- rowMeans(tf_counts[, grep("Sol.*Spectral",   names(tf_counts))])
tf_counts$log2FC     <- log2((tf_counts$Chrom_mean + 0.1) / (tf_counts$Sol_mean + 0.1))

print(tf_counts %>% arrange(desc(log2FC)) %>% select(Entry.Name, Chrom_mean, Sol_mean, log2FC) %>% head(20))

#6.5 Novel TF candidates
all_prot_counts <- prot %>%
  select(Entry.Name, Description, contains("Spectral.Count"))

all_prot_counts$Chrom_mean <- rowMeans(all_prot_counts[, grep("Chrom.*Spectral", names(all_prot_counts))])
all_prot_counts$Sol_mean   <- rowMeans(all_prot_counts[, grep("Sol.*Spectral", names(all_prot_counts))])
all_prot_counts$log2FC     <- log2((all_prot_counts$Chrom_mean + 0.1) / (all_prot_counts$Sol_mean + 0.1))

novel_tf_candidates <- all_prot_counts %>%
  filter(
    !Entry.Name %in% tf_prots$Entry.Name,
    log2FC > 1.5,
    Chrom_mean > 2,
    grepl("DNA-binding|transcription|zinc finger|chromatin", 
          Description, ignore.case = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(log2FC)) %>%
  select(Entry.Name, Description, Chrom_mean, Sol_mean, log2FC)

cat("Novel TF candidates found:", nrow(novel_tf_candidates), "\n")
print(head(novel_tf_candidates, 20))


#7. Load PSM files 
samples <- c("Chrom_01","Chrom_02","Chrom_03","Chrom_04",
             "Sol_01","Sol_02","Sol_03","Sol_04")

psm_all <- lapply(samples, function(s) {
  df <- read.delim(paste0(s, "_psm.tsv"), sep = "\t")  # ← removed subfolder
  df$Sample   <- s
  df$Fraction <- ifelse(grepl("Chrom", s), "Chrom", "Sol")
  df
}) %>% bind_rows()

#8. TF biological modifications (artifacts removed)

artifact_pattern <- "57\\.0214|15\\.9949"

tf_bio_mods <- psm_all %>%

  filter(Is.Decoy == "false",

         Is.Contaminant == "false",

         grepl(tf_keywords, Entry.Name, ignore.case = TRUE),

         Fraction == "Chrom",

         grepl("79\\.9663|Phospho", Observed.Modifications),

         !grepl(artifact_pattern, Assigned.Modifications)) %>%

  select(Entry.Name, Gene, Peptide, Modified.Peptide,

         Protein.Start, Protein.End, 

         Assigned.Modifications, Observed.Modifications,

         Sample) %>%

  arrange(Entry.Name)

print(
  tf_bio_mods %>%
    group_by(Entry.Name, Modified.Peptide, Observed.Modifications) %>%
    summarise(PSM_count = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
    arrange(desc(PSM_count))
)
tf_bio_mods %>%
  select(Entry.Name, Peptide, Observed.Modifications, Sample) %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  print()

# Methylation on TFs in chromatin
tf_methyl_mods <- psm_all %>%
  filter(Is.Decoy == "false",
         Is.Contaminant == "false",
         grepl(tf_keywords, Entry.Name, ignore.case = TRUE),
         Fraction == "Chrom",
         grepl("14\\.0157|Methylation", Observed.Modifications),
         !grepl(artifact_pattern, Assigned.Modifications)) %>%
  select(Entry.Name, Gene, Peptide, Modified.Peptide,
         Protein.Start, Protein.End,
         Assigned.Modifications, Observed.Modifications, Sample) %>%
  arrange(Entry.Name)

cat("TF chromatin methylation PSMs:", nrow(tf_methyl_mods), "\n")

# Ubiquitination on TFs in chromatin
tf_ubiq_mods <- psm_all %>%
  filter(Is.Decoy == "false",
         Is.Contaminant == "false",
         grepl(tf_keywords, Entry.Name, ignore.case = TRUE),
         Fraction == "Chrom",
         grepl("114\\.0429|Ubiquit", Observed.Modifications),
         !grepl(artifact_pattern, Assigned.Modifications)) %>%
  select(Entry.Name, Gene, Peptide, Modified.Peptide,
         Protein.Start, Protein.End,
         Assigned.Modifications, Observed.Modifications, Sample) %>%
  arrange(Entry.Name)

cat("TF chromatin ubiquitination PSMs:", nrow(tf_ubiq_mods), "\n")

# Compare phospho across both fractions
psm_all %>%
  filter(Is.Decoy == "false",
         Is.Contaminant == "false",
         grepl(tf_keywords, Entry.Name, ignore.case = TRUE),
         grepl("79\\.9663|Phospho", Observed.Modifications)) %>%
  group_by(Entry.Name, Fraction) %>%
  summarise(PSM_count = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(Entry.Name, Fraction) %>%
  print()


#9. Save Excel 
write_xlsx(list(
  TF_PTMs             = tf_ptms,
  Unknown_mods        = head(unknown, 50),
  Known_all           = known,
  TF_proteins         = tf_prots,
  TF_Chrom_Sol        = tf_counts,
  Novel_TF_candidates = novel_tf_candidates,
  TF_phospho_chrom    = tf_bio_mods,      
  TF_methyl_chrom     = tf_methyl_mods,   
  TF_ubiq_chrom       = tf_ubiq_mods,     
  Full_summary        = mods
), "tf_ptm_results/TF_PTM_results.xlsx")
```
